message:
feat(fp-columnar): add diff_valid/sample/first_valid/last_valid (frankenpandas-75el)

Four utility helpers:

- diff_valid() — element-wise difference that skips missing inputs
  when picking the "previous" value (matches s.dropna().diff()
  .reindex(s.index)). Result dtype Float64.
- sample(n, seed) — no-replacement uniform sample with a
  deterministic seed-driven partial Fisher-Yates shuffle using an
  LCG (no rand crate dependency). n >= len clones.
- first_valid() / last_valid() — positions of the first/last
  non-missing entries (positional cousins of pandas'
  first_valid_index / last_valid_index).

Co-lands frankenpandas-fmk5 (sample), ntt4 (first_valid/last_valid).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
